heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
label: 190106 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
text: The corporation and its subordinate departmental subdivisions and local chapters have the exclusive right to use the name “Reserve Officers Association of the United States” and seals, emblems, and badges the corporation adopts.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)19010636:238., .June 30, 1950, ch. 431, § 1864 Stat. 315The words “sole”, “to have, and”, “in carrying out its object and purpose”, and “lawfully” are omitted as unnecessary.
